Probably that's not really possible but you're curious, right? Like you want to find out what in the world this is even about, right? If that's true, this is the title. It's how my 15 year old sold 100,000, $270 and just nine short months and how you and your kids can actually do it too. How many of you guys would love to have your kids instead of like bugging you and begging you for money or actually producing money? How many of you guys want that for your kids? Okay. Now that's the first thing I'm going to be covering. Now what's interesting about this is the way the whole thing started is that my goal was never for me or for my kids to be like entrepreneurs. I do things entrepreneurially. I love having businesses and things but one day my daughter was sitting there and she wanted, she wasn't cleaning the house, she wasn't even at home working. It's kind of frustrating to me. I said, look, you've got two options. One is you're going to move out and you're going to be gone out of my life. Number two, all right. Number two is you've got to do your homework and clean up your room. Number three, you've got to start a business. You can pick whichever one you want. Now my daughter is very smart apparently because she didn't move out and she didn't do her homework but what she did instead is she decided to actually go and start a business. Which is well, it depends on if the people are cheap or if they're rich, whatever it is but on average maybe $10 an hour. I found out this cool thing over here where people were actually looking for them. I met some bloggers who have blogs who actually get paid to talk about cool products. I found out these pillowcases are really cool. And so, what I did is I sent this, I sent five of these pillowcases to this blog over here. You see, maybe you've heard of her blog. It's ourbestbytes.com, right? And it went there and she actually got the pillowcase and she loved it. And so, what she did is she posted a blog post on her blog showing the pillowcase. And from that, we had 5,000 people who clicked on the link to buy the pillowcase. And from that, 200 people actually bought the pillowcase. Now, I spent $1.13 to buy the pillowcase in China. It cost me 50 cents to get shipped here to America. I paid the blogger $2 for every pillowcase that they sold. That means I made $12 for every single pillowcase that sold. We sold 200 of them. That was from one blogger. How many blogs are there around the world? There's a lot, like not 10,000,000s and thousands of blogs. And that was from one person.
